case_title: ANNA PERLMUTTER et al VS. AYMAN (DANNY) IBRAHIM

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED. FILED BY DEFENDANT IBRAHIM, AYMAN (DANNY) AS TO PLAINTIFF PERLMUTTER, ANNA SCHUETZE, CRAIG BEACH, MICHAEL NORMANDALE, HEATHER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-26-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TO EFFECT SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PLTFS WERE FURNISHED WITH A COPY OF CONTINUANCE DATE AND DEFT WAS MAILED OF THE SAME.

CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT.ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERLMUTTER, ANNA SCHUETZE, CRAIG BEACH, MICHAEL NORMANDALE, HEATHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IBRAHIM, AYMAN (DANNY) $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
